name: Pina Colada Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Crushed pineapple (drain and reserve liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
3. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
4. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Alternately add the flour, baking powder, and liquids (half & half and coconut rum), mixing gently after each addition.
6. Stir in the reserved pineapple liquid and shredded coconut.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan.
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. For the glaze, combine sugar, pineapple juice, and water in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
10. Remove from heat and stir in the coconut rum.
11. Pour the glaze over the warm cake while still slightly hot, allowing it to drip down the sides of the cake.
This recipe provides clear instructions for preparing and baking the Pina Colada Pound Cake, as well as creating a sweet pineapple glaze to finish the dessert.
